sections.heading: PDF export updated
sections.paragraph: PDF export is now updated and works correctly.

sections.heading: Links updated
sections.paragraph: All links are now typed inside [] and the link type is automatically detected. You  can also add an link label now by typing it like this: [link label](link).

sections.heading: Bug fixes
sections.paragraph: When you type ** over painted text, the text will be bolded and when you type `` over painted text, the text will be made inline code.

sections.heading: Scroll adjusted
sections.paragraph: Now when you type in your note it won't allways scroll it, it'll only scroll when you create new text lines past an point close the bottom of the screen.
